parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(value->>'chat_id','') AS chat_id FROM pipeline_settings WHERE key = 'telegram_review_chat_id';

WITH picked AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM classification_review_queue
  WHERE status = 'pending'
  ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at ASC
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
),
claimed AS (
  UPDATE classification_review_queue q
  SET status = 'sending'
  FROM picked p
  WHERE q.id = p.id
  RETURNING q.id, q.product_id, q.run_id, q.telegram_chat_id, q.payload, q.status, q.priority, q.created_at
)
SELECT
  c.id,
  c.product_id,
  c.run_id,
  c.telegram_chat_id,
  c.status,
  c.priority,
  c.created_at,
  c.payload || jsonb_build_object(
    'shortlist_top', (
      SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(enriched ORDER BY ord), '[]'::jsonb)
      FROM (
        SELECT
          ord,
          jsonb_strip_nulls(jsonb_build_object(
            'category_id', cd.id,
            'category_code', cd.category_code,
            'category_name', cd.category_name,
            'direction', cd.direction,
            'hierarchy_level', cd.hierarchy_level,
            'product_type', cd.product_type,
            'administration_route', cd.administration_route,
            'age_segment', cd.age_segment,
            'mnn_cluster', cd.mnn_cluster,
            'need_nosology', cd.need_nosology,
            'differentiation_degree', cd.differentiation_degree,
            'inclusion_comment', cd.inclusion_comment,
            'notes', cd.notes,
            'include_keywords', to_jsonb(cd.include_keywords),
            'exclude_keywords', to_jsonb(cd.exclude_keywords),
            'score', NULLIF(elem->>'score','')::numeric
          )) AS enriched
        FROM jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(c.payload->'shortlist_top', '[]'::jsonb))
          WITH ORDINALITY AS t(elem, ord)
        LEFT JOIN categories_dict cd
          ON cd.id = NULLIF(elem->>'category_id', '')::bigint
      ) x
    ),
    'suggested_category', (
      SELECT jsonb_strip_nulls(jsonb_build_object(
        'category_id', cd.id,
        'category_code', cd.category_code,
        'category_name', cd.category_name,
        'direction', cd.direction,
        'hierarchy_level', cd.hierarchy_level,
        'product_type', cd.product_type,
        'administration_route', cd.administration_route,
        'age_segment', cd.age_segment,
        'mnn_cluster', cd.mnn_cluster,
        'need_nosology', cd.need_nosology,
        'differentiation_degree', cd.differentiation_degree,
        'inclusion_comment', cd.inclusion_comment,
        'notes', cd.notes,
        'include_keywords', to_jsonb(cd.include_keywords),
        'exclude_keywords', to_jsonb(cd.exclude_keywords)
      ))
      FROM categories_dict cd
      WHERE cd.id = NULLIF(c.payload->>'suggested_category_id', '')::bigint
    )
  ) AS payload
FROM claimed c;
